title: Enhanced Survival Servers
description: Modpack focused on improving Survival Servers
body:
# Enhanced Survival Servers


Modpack that focus on improving the experience of Minecraft Survival Servers or SMP's!

# What do we have to offer
It improves the visuals, performance and has some great QOL mods.

# Features
For example we have mods like **Distant Horizons** for more chunks with better performance, **Resourcify** to add resourcepacks or shaderpacks in game, **Xaero'S world map** which shows you all the important things about the world you are in. And great optimization mods like **Sodium, Lithium and Thread Tweak** or ReplayMod for content creators or cinematics!

# Mod Loader
Enhanced Survival Servers run on fabric for the best experience and optimization!

# For Who?
For people who are looking for optimization and vannila like experience on most multiplayer survival servers.
